# Hermes Agent — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | — | Not a data source |
| [[email-verification]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[email-warmup]] | — | Not applicable |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | Persistent memory builds deepening user profile; 200+ models via OpenRouter/Nous Portal; voice consistency across sessions; self-improving model |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | — | No native sequencer capability |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | IMAP/SMTP email adapter; single gateway across Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Email, CLI; auto-generates reply drafts with persistent memory; full thread context via In-Reply-To/References headers |

## Vendor Type
Open-source autonomous AI agent. Primarily an always-on personal assistant with strong email capabilities as one channel among many.

## Best For
Power users who want a single AI agent managing communications across all platforms (email, Slack, Telegram etc.) with persistent memory. Particularly strong for maintaining conversation context across channels.

## Limitations
- Open-source — requires self-hosting and technical setup
- No native campaign management or warm-up
- Not designed specifically for cold outreach at scale
- Model hosting costs apply (OpenRouter or Nous Portal)
